landing.title: Invest in the places you love.
landing.subtitle: Own a stake in real, local businesses — restaurants, cafes, craft workshops — and earn a share of their profits.
landing.step1Desc: Discover local businesses looking for investors.
landing.step2Desc: Pick a company and acquire an ownership stake.
landing.step3Desc: Receive monthly profit-share payments on your investment.

about.title: Our Mission
about.subtitle: An online marketplace that connects growth-seeking businesses with people who want to invest in them.
about.whatIsDesc: MicroVest is a community investment platform where everyday people can acquire real ownership stakes in local businesses — restaurants, cafes, craft workshops — and earn a share of their profits.
about.forInvestors1: Acquire real ownership in tangible businesses you understand and can visit.
about.forInvestors2: If you have marketing or logistics expertise, you can contribute your knowledge to the businesses you invest in.
about.forInvestors3: Receive monthly profit-share payments — real, measurable returns on your investment.
about.forInvestors4: As a committed co-owner, you become personally invested in the success of the business.
about.forCompanies1: No need to beg a bank for a loan or sell your soul to a single large investor.
about.forCompanies2: Raise capital from your community to open a new location, buy equipment, or expand.
about.forCompanies3: Gain a group of committed co-owners who will spread the word about your business.
about.forCompanies4: Payments are always tied to actual profits — if there's no profit, there's no payment obligation.
about.returnsDesc: The business pays a monthly percentage of its profits to investors.
about.returnModel1Desc: The entrepreneur pays a share of revenue until the investor has fully recouped their original investment. After that, continued dividend payments are pure profit for the investor.
about.returnModel2Desc: The entrepreneur pays a share of revenue until the investor recoups their original investment plus a fixed agreed-upon multiplier (e.g. 1.5×).
about.keyDifferenceDesc: Unlike a bank loan, payments are always tied to actual profit. If there's no profit in a given month, no payment is due.

portfolio.title: Your Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Track your local investments
portfolio.emptyAction: Browse businesses and make your first investment!

business.title: Business Dashboard
business.subtitle: Manage your campaign and company data
business.addCompanyDesc: Submit your company details to appear on the platform.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: The secondary marketplace will let you buy and sell existing investment stakes with other users.
